themes.exampleQuote: Some of the best tiki drinks in the U.S.
The staff is super excited to give recommendations, which are needed with how many options they have!
Tiki isn't just a theme, it's a movement.
Auto 20% tip that is hidden — no one tells you, all you see is a receipt that says total.
Each drink has its own unique glass/mug, some of which you can buy to take home.
I got a 'very strong' tiki drink at around $20, but it only had 1.5 shots of liquor — do not advertise like it's alcohol-packed.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about Hidden Harbor's immersive tiki atmosphere, inventive cocktails, and enthusiastic staff, but a vocal minority resents the undisclosed 20% auto-gratuity and questions whether the premium pricing reflects genuine value.
notable_quote: Tiki isn't just a theme, it's a movement.
